title: 102 Dalmatians
review_summary: The reviewer enjoys "102 Dalmatians," praising its humor, acting performances including Glenn Close's portrayal of Cruella DeVille. Notable points include excellent costume design for both adult-focused subtleties in comedy as well as close attention to character detail like handcuffs during the Behaviour Modification Clinic scene. Overall positive sentiment with appreciation noted for various elements across different audiences and an impressive performance by Tim
